feature_name: C64x+ VLIW core and instruction set
description: Fixed-point C64x+ DSP core with eight-issue VLIW pipeline; SIMD-style ops; caches and L2 for throughput; deterministic timing requires careful scheduling and cache planning.
dependencies: None; optional cache and memory configuration during init

description: On-chip instruction cache ~32 KB reduces fetch latency; benefits from code locality; consider L2 SRAM locking for determinism.
dependencies: Optional cache configuration via startup code

description: On-chip data cache ~32 KB accelerates data access; coordinate with DMA to avoid coherency issues; align buffers.
dependencies: Cache maintenance or non-cacheable regions when using DMA

description: Configurable as SRAM/cache or mixed; lock critical code/data for determinism; extends hot working set.
dependencies: Startup configuration of L2 and memory attributes

description: CPU-triggered on-chip copies for short deterministic moves between L1/L2; complements EDMA.
dependencies: None; coordinate with cache settings

description: JEDEC-compliant external SDRAM; requires timing/sequence programming; verify with pattern tests before high-throughput.
dependencies: PSC enable; stable PLL/clock; board-specific DDR parameters

description: High-throughput memory/peripheral transfers with PaRAM link/chain; queues and TCs; IPR/ICR and CCERR for status.
dependencies: PSC enable for EDMA CC/TC; INTC mapping; optional event routing

description: 10/100/1000 MAC with DMA rings; ALE/filtering; MDIO PHY management; ensure cache-coherent descriptors.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; MDIO clock; PHY; DMA rings; INTC

description: Conventional PCI host/slave; config header and BARs expose windows; use EDMA for bulk; align endianness.
dependencies: PSC enable; host reset; BAR/window map; EDMA for bulk

description: External host memory-map access; width/reset/handshake controls; supports polled/interrupt modes.
dependencies: PSC enable; host timing/handshake; INTC if used

description: Point-to-point serial link mapping peer resources; requires consistent config; verify windows before DMA.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; peer config; window mapping

description: Multichannel TDM/I2S; SRGR clocking; RCR/XCR frame control; DRR/DXR FIFOs; EDMA servicing.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; EDMA setup; INTC mapping

description: Master/slave CPOL/CPHA; SPIFMT and SPIDELAY configure format/timing; EDMA for long transfers.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; CS wiring; optional EDMA/interrupts

description: Master/slave with programmable SCL timing; ICMDR/ICSTR control/status; external pull-ups required.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; external pull-ups; INTC mapping

description: 16550-like with RX/TX FIFOs; DLL/DLH divisors generate baud; EDMA optional for sustained rates.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; reference clock; INTC mapping

description: Up to 32 GPIO; per-bit direction; SET/CLR/IN_DATA access; edge-detect and banked interrupts.
dependencies: PSC enable; PINMUX; INTC mapping; optional EDMA sync

description: 64-bit or dual 32-bit operation; periodic/one-shot; compare/overflow interrupts; capture/PWM via pinmux.
dependencies: PSC enable; INTC mapping; optional PINMUX for capture/PWM

description: Main PLL and peripheral dividers; follow lock/unlock sequence; ensure stability before enabling DDR/high-speed IO.
dependencies: Stable ref clock; correct programming order; PSC sequencing

description: Power/clock gating per domain; transition to ENABLE before access; gate unused modules.
dependencies: Required by all peripheral drivers; domain ordering

description: KICK unlock protects PINMUX writes; select functions to avoid conflicts; preserve reserved fields.
dependencies: KICK unlock sequence; ordered with PSC to avoid unsafe toggles

description: Event combiner and INTMUX map events to CPU interrupts; clear peripheral flags before ack to avoid retrigger.
dependencies: Peripheral enables; INTMUX mapping; optional event combiner

description: ROM selects boot source by straps; loads first-stage to internal memory; app reprograms PLL/PSC/DDR.
dependencies: Board straps; ROM revision; boot media present

description: IDLE gates core clock until interrupt; PSC gates domains for deeper savings; coordinate entry/exit.
dependencies: Wake interrupt routing; PSC domain config

description: JTAG for debug/trace; emulation-aware options keep clocks during halt; consider side effects on timers/DMA/links.
dependencies: External emulator; toolchain integration

description: Write-1-to-clear status; EDMA IPR/ICR/CCERR; centralize logging and counters for diagnostics.
dependencies: Per-driver ISR/polling; logging infra

description: MAR policy defines cacheability for external regions; isolate MMIO non-cacheable; DMA buffers coherent.
dependencies: Privileged CPU setup; coordinated with cache/DMA
